title: Intellia Therapeutics (NASDAQ:NTLA) Posts Quarterly Earnings Results
text: Intellia Therapeutics reported Q1 2026 GAAP EPS of -$0.81, which surpassed expectations by $0.08, with revenue reaching $15.04 million, reflecting a 9.6% year-over-year decline but exceeding forecasts by $1.23 million. The company reported a trailing twelve month net loss of US$394.6 million on revenue of US$66.1 million. The average price target held steady at US$26.65, seeming to indicate that business is performing in line with expectations. The company achieved a historic milestone by presenting the world's first Phase 3 data for an in vivo gene editing candidate, with lonvo-z demonstrating 87% reduction in HAE attacks versus placebo and a favorable safety profile.
